name: ai-markdone
description: All you need for ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude & DeepSeek: reader mode, message folding, bookmarks, LaTeX copy & Markdown export.

scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:chrome: tsc && vite build --config vite.config.chrome.ts && vite build --config vite.config.chrome.background.ts
scripts.build:firefox: tsc && vite build --config vite.config.firefox.ts && vite build --config vite.config.firefox.background.ts
scripts.postbuild:chrome: cp manifest.chrome.json dist-chrome/manifest.json && mkdir -p dist-chrome/icons && cp public/icons/*.png dist-chrome/icons/ && mkdir -p dist-chrome/src/popup && cp src/popup/popup.html dist-chrome/src/popup/ && cp -r public/_locales dist-chrome/ && mkdir -p dist-chrome/vendor/katex && cp node_modules/katex/dist/katex.min.css dist-chrome/vendor/katex/ && cp -r node_modules/katex/dist/fonts dist-chrome/vendor/katex/ && npm run verify:entry-format:chrome
scripts.postbuild:firefox: cp manifest.firefox.json dist-firefox/manifest.json && mkdir -p dist-firefox/icons && cp public/icons/*.png dist-firefox/icons/ && mkdir -p dist-firefox/src/popup && cp src/popup/popup.html dist-firefox/src/popup/ && cp -r public/_locales dist-firefox/ && mkdir -p dist-firefox/vendor/katex && cp node_modules/katex/dist/katex.min.css dist-firefox/vendor/katex/ && cp -r node_modules/katex/dist/fonts dist-firefox/vendor/katex/ && npm run verify:entry-format:firefox
